outline: h2: Creating sustainable impact in apparel industry
h2: Taking Action to Save Our Planet.
h2: Services Built Around our Customers
pages.notes: Page structure: No h1 tags present. Page uses Elementor page builder (theme: JupiterX). Layout: (1) Header with logo + navigation (overlapped on page) → (2) Mission/Vision/Manufacturing 3-card carousel teaser (hover-reveal with background images) → (3) 4-step process icons (cutting, shipping, secondary cutting, clothing) → (4) Sustainability heading + 6 flip-box cards carousel (Financial Stability, Health & Family Wellbeing, Educational & Professional Development, Safe & Healthy Work Environment, Equality & Acceptance, Best Practices) with anchor links to sustainability page → (5) Environmental stats section (3 icons: recycle, save-water, energy) with counter values (0 values displayed) → (6) Accreditation carousel (14 logos in order: 1, logo_dark, amfori, 4, 5, BW-Bangladesh, images, STEP, image-removebg, 666, OCS, GRS, RCS, BSCI) → (7) Three service teaser banners (Product Development Model, Material Sourcing Management, Saving Water) with links to localhost URLs (broken links to our-capabilities section) → (8) Client carousel (20 partner logos including Primark, Pepco, Scanwear, Rewe, JackWills, Lonsdale, Puma, etc.) → (9) Footer with contact info, navigation columns, company address, phone/email, and developer credit. Contact: Phone +88 027 120 899 / 09617 000 444 / +880 9617 000 442; Email info@rizvifashions.com. Footer has 4 main nav columns: About Company, Our Capabilities, Our Products, Important Links. Sustainability cards link to http://rizvifashions.com/sustainability/ with fragment anchors. All carousel sections use Swiper.js. Environmental stats display raw numbers (likely animation placeholders). Service teasers use localhost URLs (indicates staging environment). No hero video/animation detected — static mission/vision teaser with hover effect. Header template ID 204, main page ID 159, footer ID 268.

Page structure: Header (Logo + Nav) -> Hero section with "Overview" h2 -> Two-column content section with "Who we are" h2 on right column -> Manufacturing stats strip (about-7.png, 1366x143, horizontal bar) -> BGMEA partner logo strip -> Footer with Contact/Factory info. Key content blocks: (1) Who We Are copy - 100% export oriented unit established 2013, factory infrastructure details; (2) Technology/Scale/Range - CAD-CAM tools, 2631 modern machines, 5.0-5.5M pcs/month capacity, 5120 employees, product range (Trousers, Jersey, T-shirts, Polo-Shirts, Hoodie, Sweatshirt, Shorts, Lingerie, Babies Wear, Underwear, knitwear); (3) BGMEA strip - membership in Bangladesh Garment Manufacturers and Exporters Association mentioned in second content block. Page uses Elementor page builder with sections (bc0ab43=hero, 80298b8=Who We Are, 5acb8f71=content+spacer, b5ba89a=BGMEA image strip). No text overlays on images. Footer is 5-column layout (Contact US/Head Office/Factory, About Company links, Our Capabilities links, plus two unlabeled columns).

pages.chartData: Revenue chart (Untitled-1.png) and Future Goal chart (Future-Goal-2.png) are rendered as static PNG images (855x465px). The HTML contains only the image files without embedded JSON or canvas rendering. Exact numeric data points cannot be extracted from the HTML as they are embedded in the image files themselves, not as recoverable text or data attributes.
pages.notes: Page uses Elementor page builder with JupiterX theme. Key sections: (1) Hero with Company Profile title. (2) Our Mission section (id=our-mission) with vertical jet-headline widget. (3) Accreditations & Certifications with image carousel of 14 certification logos. (4) Our Vision section (id=our-vision) with vertical jet-headline widget. (5) Manufacturing section (id=manufacturing) with capacity counters: Cutting Capacity (250,000 pcs daily), Shipment Capacity (5.5M pcs per month), Sewing Capacity (220,000 pcs per day), Finishing Capacity (240,000 pcs per day). (6) Business Growth section with two static PNG charts: Revenue and Future Goal. (7) Manufacturing image carousel with 4 process images. (8) Clients carousel (20 partner logos). (9) Footer with address and links. Primary widget types used: counter, heading, jet-headline, image-carousel, image, text-editor, icon-list, raven-heading, social-icons. The page has jet_parallax_layout effects on sections. All chart images are static PNGs with no data extraction possible from HTML.

Page has two main sections: (1) Managing Director's Profile - text-only, no portrait image, covering MD Md. Shakil Rizvi's background; (2) Management Team grid with 2 visible members (REHANA RIZVI as Chairman with generic avatar placeholder, SHAIKH REZWAN as Director with actual photo). Both team members use Elementor/Jet team-member widgets with cover-hover image effects. MD Profile section is visually separate from Management Team section. SRSL logo (Shakil Rizvi Stock Limited affiliate) is presented as clickable element linking to #jupiterx-main. Page uses Elementor page builder with Jet advanced elements for team widgets and headlines. No h1 tags present on page.

pages.notes: Page structure: Hero intro (Our Capabilities title) followed by 8 capability sections in logical workflow order. Material Sourcing Management has hero image (threads_large.webp) with 4 sub-label categories: Fabric, Trims, Label, Accessories (each backed by fancybox background images: fabric.jpg, garment-labelling.jpeg, images.jpg respectively; Trims category image not found in crawl). Each subsequent section (Product Development through Printing) has a corresponding section hero image. Raven-counter stat widgets display capacity metrics: Sample (2 counters), Cutting (2), Sewing (3), Finishing (1), Knitting (2), Printing (1). No H1 present; page uses H2 for all section headings. Note: "Lable" misspelled as "Lable" in source appears in Material Sourcing sub-labels.

Page built with Elementor page builder using Raven tabs widget for category navigation. Five product categories displayed via horizontal tabbed interface: Men's Wear (12 images), Women's Wear (19 images), Kid's Wear (12 images), Underwear (9 images), New Born (15 images). Products rendered in 4-column WordPress gallery grid with lightbox functionality. All 67 product images lack alt text (empty alt attributes). Tab IDs: men, women, kid, underware (note spelling), new-born. Gallery markup uses gallery-item figures with lightbox data attributes. No introductory text or category descriptions present; products display directly beneath tabs.

outline: h2: Safe and Healthy Work Environment
pages.notes: Page uses Elementor page builder with six main sections accessed via anchor navigation. Each section contains an introductory paragraph followed by bullet-point list of initiatives. No h1 tag present; main h2 is "Sustainability". Bullet lists embedded as span elements within elementor-widget containers. Favicons (150x150 and standard) are standard header assets, not page content — excluded. All six sections have matching id attributes in section HTML tags. Contact/address info appears at end of Best Practices section. No hero image or full-width content imagery present; layout is text-heavy with emphasis on structured lists.

Gallery page uses Elementor with Raven Photo Album widget (raven-photo-album-skin-cover). Structure: 3-column grid on desktop, 2-column on tablet, 1-column mobile (cover_columns: 3, cover_columns_tablet: 2, cover_columns_mobile: 1). Six gallery items arranged as cover cards with circular thumbnail carousels. Each item has a main clickable link to full-size image and lightbox slideshow via data-elementor-lightbox-slideshow attribute. Lightbox functionality integrated via Elementor's lightbox (not a separate plugin — native to Elementor widget). Thumbnails displayed inline under each gallery item title (Gallery 1-6). All gallery content images from 2023/03/ directory. No separate lightbox plugin detected; Elementor handles slideshow/lightbox natively. Footer contains additional section headings (Contact US, Head Office, Factory, etc.) from footer template. JupiterX theme active with Elementor page builder.

Page ID: 2902. Elementor-based layout using JupiterX theme. Page currently displays only "Career" h2 heading in a full-width hero section (elementor-element-bc0ab43) followed by a content section (elementor-element-e9e1746) with "Under Construction..." h2 heading. No forms present. No actual career content implemented. Page structure: header (elementor-204) > main content area (elementor-2902) > footer (elementor-268). Navigation includes About Us, Overview, Company Profile, Management, Gallery, Our Capabilities, Our Products, Sustainability, Career, and Contact menu items in header.

Built with Elementor page builder (v3.13.2) + Raven form plugin (JupiterX theme ecosystem). Contact form uses RAVEN FORM widget (not WPForms/CF7/Gravity Forms). Form ID: 377792f6, POST ID: 1979. Form method=post, client-side handling. No reCAPTCHA configured (recaptcha_badge/theme/size all null). Two Google Maps embeds: (1) Head Office at "158-160, Motijheel C/A Modhumita Building 4th Floor Dhaka-1000, Bangladesh" zoom 15; (2) Factory at "Anwar Jang Road, 1 No, Kalma Bazar, Savar, Dhaka-1341, Bangladesh" zoom 15. Key contacts section lists 3 people: Shakil Rizvi (MD, rizvi@rizvifashions.com), Shaikh Rezwan (Director, shaikhrezwan@rizvifashions.com), Muhammad Mizanur Rahman (DGM, mizan@rizvifashions.com) with cell +8801674-173462. Multiple phone/email variants in footer footer: info@rizvifashions.com repeated, +88027120899, 09617000444, +8809617000442, +8801912708566. Acceptance checkbox with privacy text present (optional). No H1 tag on page. Section order: hero → form section → key contacts block → office address cards → maps → footer.
